headline: Man's 'I Don't Like Drama' Is Actually The Most Dramatic Statement Anyone Can Make
summary: He said it in a dramatic whisper, then dramatically left the room, then dramatically returned to clarify.
fullBody: Jake NoDrama began every sentence with 'I don't like drama' — dramatically. 'I hate conflict,' he said, starting conflict. His friends have a bingo card. 'He's the most dramatic person I know,' one said. Jake has since created a 'no drama' Slack channel — where he posts dramatic updates about how drama-free he is. The channel has 47 members. They're all discussing Jake.
